raw_excerpt: At the White House today, the first major piece of U.S. crypto legislation was signed into law: the GENIUS Act (Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins Act). It provides clear rules for stablecoins and recently passed both the Senate and House of Representatives with broad bipartisan support. This is a historic moment —...
title: Clear rules for stablecoins and the road ahead
